channel.title: TECHATPARK - BUILDING PRO-GRAMMERS !
channel.description: Recent content on TECHATPARK - BUILDING PRO-GRAMMERS !

item.title: Why Opensource is a serious business (today) ?
item.description: Opensource is everywhere today. Be it the mobiles we use or cloud, Opensource is behind most of the things we enjoy today. What is it really ? Opensource means technology that is run by some great people who does not care about much money and makes cheap business solutions. Fair ?! Might be few decades ago. An Idea which is considered stupid by many, slowly and steadily it proved its worth.

item.title: Sets
item.description: Open Source is a stupid idea Definition “Opensource means technology that are done some of the great people who does not think about money to make cheap business solutions.”

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Achievements More than 80% of our students are first-generation engineers of their families. We positioned a candidate for a startup that happily accepted 6 consecutive students. Today techatpark is run by our own eX-students.

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Idea of TECH@PARK was not born in boardroom discussion. We are not backed by any funding. We do not have classrooms or paid instructors. But still we have made a difrence in the quality of talents we produce. Our results are diffrent because our methods itself is different Picking a Candidate We identify potential candidates through trusted sources ( i.e. Colleagues/Ex-Students) who know their potentials personally. we then interview certain parameters to see if he has 'IT' in him

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Our Values Chosen We handpick our students. If one gets into us, it means he/she deserves 'IT'! Up to Date Professionally Trained by experts from industry. Our syllabus is always evolving with current market needs/trends.. No waiting time Our students are technically productive from day 1

item.title: Post No. 2
item.description: Powder gummi bears I love muffin. Chocolate cake pastry chupa chups I love jelly beans muffin. Sweet roll topping jujubes sweet cake. Topping marshmallow bonbon candy canes. Jujubes sweet jelly beans pie donut. Candy canes lollipop I love marshmallow. Lollipop donut I love chocolate bar gummies I love lollipop pie jelly beans. Jelly beans oat cake I love. Halvah bear claw caramels chocolate sweet cotton candy pudding macaroon. Cheesecake cookie cake chocolate bar cupcake ice cream chocolate cake.

item.title: Post No. 3
item.description: Bonbon macaroon candy canes tart halvah sweet cotton candy pastry. Gummies oat cake marzipan I love icing cookie cookie cotton candy. Halvah fruitcake pastry I love gummies. Gummi bears danish fruitcake soufflé candy canes cheesecake I love. Cupcake I love tiramisu marzipan powder tootsie roll cookie chocolate cake cake. Cotton candy jelly-o liquorice. Jelly-o chupa chups jelly beans jelly beans. Brownie cookie I love cotton candy gingerbread cupcake jelly liquorice I love.
